'''Amber Jevanche''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] star, known for her honey-sweet, throaty voice. She was especially popular among young males in the first years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="Murder" /> The [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Ugmush]] used the voice of Jevanche in her [[transliterator]].<ref name="Planet">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref>
